blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 67".
